reasoning_model_1: The model demonstrates perfect content accuracy, with the generated speech matching the script verbatim ('我明天会去图书馆自习...'). reasoning_model_2: The model successfully generates the correct text content without any errors or omissions. The paralinguistic feature 'Normal Volume' is executed perfectly. model_comparison: Both models performed exceptionally well on the specific dimension of 'Volume' (音量). Both Model 1 and Model 2 delivered the script with clear, audible, and consistent volume levels that perfectly represent standard human speech. As both models achieved the target feature to the highest standard without any discernible flaw or meaningful difference in the quality of the volume control, the result is an even tie.
